autonomous_refueling.cn: Active in-orbit servicing and refueling demonstrations
autonomous_refueling.notes: No movement this week; commercial refueling tugs remain latent co-orbital inspection/grappling capability.
autonomous_refueling.us: Multiple commercial refueling/tug efforts in development

cislunar_operations.cn: Sustained lunar/cislunar mission investment with latent military utility
cislunar_operations.notes: US commercial entrant targeting the exact regime where SDA is weakest; capital injected but SPAC financing and execution risk high. Gap closing slowly.
cislunar_operations.us: SPACECOM studying offensive cislunar concepts; Quantum Space (Bolden) SPAC funds purpose-built HEO/cislunar maneuver craft

counterspace_resilience.cn: Demonstrated counterspace intent; investment in degrading US awareness
counterspace_resilience.notes: Congressional friction signals anxiety that Space Force is trading enduring overhead capacity for unproven alternatives faster than replacements mature. Russian orbital GPS jamming raises the PNT-denial threat baseline (see pnt_denial).
counterspace_resilience.us: Epic Fury exposed distributed-ops/EW gaps; HASC pushing back on missile-warning cancellations and PNT-resilience choices

geo_rpo.cn: Demonstrated GEO RPO and towing (e.g., SJ-series maneuvers)
geo_rpo.notes: US commercial RPO maturity could advance via Hubble reboost — docking/attitude-matching/delta-v transfer on a high-value non-standardized target, directly counterspace-relevant. Still contingent on mission economics.
geo_rpo.us: Operational servicing/RPO heritage (MEV-class); potential commercial Hubble reboost as uncooperative-target RPO pathfinder

high_power_orbital_platforms.cn: Multiple parallel LEO broadband/D2D programs (Qianfan, Guowang); state push toward on-orbit computing buses
high_power_orbital_platforms.notes: China layering coordinating/industrial-policy bodies around orbital compute — same state-coordination-then-subsidized-commercial pattern used for launch and LEO constellations. Power-dense buses inherently dual-use.
high_power_orbital_platforms.us: Muon Condor-Ultra (Starship-class) bus pitched; no anchor customer

leo_logistics_nodes.notes: New entry. Allied government anchor customers underpin the economics of persistent LEO platforms that are latent forward staging nodes for servicing/refueling/responsive ops. Recurring ISS air-leak shelter events underscore aging-platform fragility and US reliance on commercial crew vehicles.
leo_logistics_nodes.us: Commercial station developers courting European/allied anchor tenants as ISS winds down; Dragon serving as independent survival node

megaconstellation_deployment.cn: Qianfan crossed 200 satellites on sustained dual-rocket-family (LM-8/LM-6A) cadence; parallel Guowang build-out
megaconstellation_deployment.notes: New entry. China still well behind Starlink rate but trend accelerating; dual rocket families reduce single-point-of-failure risk. Mature Qianfan/Guowang gives PLA resilient, commercially-deniable comms/PNT augmentation complicating US degradation efforts.
megaconstellation_deployment.us: Starlink deployment rate remains the benchmark; Kuiper diversifying onto Ariane 6 (36-sat batch)

on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.cn: Recoverable capsule heritage; no comparable commercial downmass-for-manufacturing vehicle disclosed
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.notes: No US movement; European Nyx cargo capsule validated parachute recovery (drop test) but 2028 timeline and allied provenance limit near-term competitive weight — still a latent maneuverable RPO/inspection platform.
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.us: SpaceX Starfall reentry vehicle in FAA-planning stage; Dragon downmass operational

orbital_compute_kill_chain.cn: Beijing erecting coordinating committees/industrial-policy bodies for on-orbit computing capacity
orbital_compute_kill_chain.notes: New entry. On-orbit edge processing for ISR/AI inference compresses sensor-to-effect latency and erodes US ground-processing edge; architecture opaque from open sources but the institutional pattern signals serious intent.
orbital_compute_kill_chain.us: Advantage rooted in ground-based processing speed; no disclosed equivalent orbital-compute industrial push

orbital_transfer_vehicles.cn: Active but less publicly visible OTV/tug development; pursuing high-power electric/nuclear propulsion
orbital_transfer_vehicles.notes: NASA compressed NEP demo timeline signals urgency on high-delta-V cross-regime maneuver; flight-proven NEP would directly enable rapid repositioning and adversary-satellite shadowing. Slippage risk real.
orbital_transfer_vehicles.us: Production-scaling (Impulse $500M); multiple commercial OTV providers; NEP demo accelerated toward ~2027

pnt_denial.cn: Counterspace and EW intent; benefits from allied/adversary PNT-denial pressure on US
pnt_denial.notes: New entry (INTL/Russia-driven). Evidence of Russian space-based GPS jamming/spoofing — a qualitative escalation beyond ground emitters that is harder to geolocate, attribute, and counter. Moderate open-source confidence; consistent with prior Russian EW doctrine.
pnt_denial.us: Defending PNT resilience; HASC criticizing GPS management amid replacement-pipeline anxiety

responsive_launch.cn: Demonstrated no-notice maiden flight of reusable LM-12B with operational payloads
responsive_launch.us: Mature reusable cadence (Falcon 9); Tactically Responsive Space doctrine maturing

reusable_heavy_lift.cn: LM-12B converging on boostback/propulsive-landing architecture; medium-heavy class
reusable_heavy_lift.notes: No movement this week; China continues deliberate convergence on proven Falcon 9 reuse design.
reusable_heavy_lift.us: Operational reusable lead (Falcon 9/Heavy); Starship in development

sb_amti_targeting.notes: No movement this week; multi-vendor approach adds counterspace resilience.
sb_amti_targeting.us: Funded proliferated LEO SB-AMTI layer ($4.16B SpaceX + planned multi-vendor)

space_based_interceptors.cn: No confirmed comparable space-based kinetic interceptor program
space_based_interceptors.notes: No movement this week; overlaps co-orbital attack capability set; slippage likely.
space_based_interceptors.us: Northrop-Apex Golden Dome SBI; 2027 on-orbit demo target

spectrum_orbital_slots.cn: Filed ITU claims for ~200,000 additional satellites ahead of WRC-27
spectrum_orbital_slots.notes: New entry. First-come-first-served filings function as legal squatter claims foreclosing future US/allied orbital and frequency access; WRC-27 becomes a space-power battleground. Ability to populate slots is secondary to the legal encumbrance.
spectrum_orbital_slots.us: Lacks comparably aggressive ITU filing posture; exposure to interference claims in a crisis

vleo_persistent_isr.cn: Not the lead actor; India-Korea (Bellatrix/TelePIX) 2028 allied demo
vleo_persistent_isr.notes: UK NewOrbit closed $18.5M Series A but remains pre-flight with a distant 2028 target — Five Eyes-relevant but no near-term operational weight. Air-breathing VLEO still unproven at scale.
vleo_persistent_isr.us: Limited disclosed air-breathing VLEO ISR programs
